instruction: Two subtle issues on the cloud lightning icon: the red X mark is the wrong shade (very dark gray) AND it has drifted slightly (~2px). Restore it precisely.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/cloud-lightning.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M19 16.9A5 5 0 0 0 18 7h-1.26a8 8 0 1 0-11.62 9"/><polyline points="13 11 9 17 15 17 11 23"/></g>
  <polyline id="x" fill="none" stroke="#1a1a1a" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="98,14 110,26 104,20 110,14 98,26" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/cloud-lightning.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M19 16.9A5 5 0 0 0 18 7h-1.26a8 8 0 1 0-11.62 9"/><polyline points="13 11 9 17 15 17 11 23"/></g>
  <polyline id="x" fill="none" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="100,16 112,28 106,22 112,16 100,28" />
</svg>
